mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE cm_topo_item SET dev_kind2 = #{devKind2}, usr_kind = CONCAT(#{devKind2}, '_A1') WHERE user_id = AND item_no = #{itemNo}

UPDATE cm_topo_item
item_size = NULL,
font_size = NULL,
item_conf = item_conf::jsonb
- '${item}'
,
WHERE user_id = AND item_no = #{itemNo}

UPDATE cm_topo_item
item_size = NULL,
font_size = NULL,
item_conf = item_conf::jsonb
- '${item}'
,
WHERE user_id = AND item_no IN (
#{itemNo}
)
mapper.select: SELECT item_no, dev_name, dev_ip, url, icmp_polling FROM cm_topo_etc WHERE user_id = AND item_no = #{itemNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE cm_topo_etc SET dev_name = #{devName}, dev_ip = #{devIp}, url = #{url}, icmp_polling = #{icmpPolling} WHERE user_id = AND item_no = #{itemNo}
mapper.select: SELECT user_content FROM cm_topo_item WHERE item_no = #{itemNo} AND user_id =
mapper.update: UPDATE cm_url_template_code SET code_value1 = #{httpSet}, code_value2 = #{type1}, code_value3 = #{type2}, code_value4 = #{type3}, code_value5 = #{type4}, code_value6 = #{type5}, code_value7 = #{type6}, code_value8 = #{type7}, memo = #{templeName} WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.code_id, COALESCE(A.code_value1, '') AS code_value1, COALESCE(A.code_value2, '') AS code_value2, COALESCE(A.code_value3, '') AS code_value3, COALESCE(A.code_value4, '') AS code_value4, COALESCE(A.code_value5, '') AS code_value5, COALESCE(A.code_value6, '') AS code_value6, COALESCE(A.code_value7, '') AS code_value7, COALESCE(A.code_value8, '') AS code_value8, A.memo FROM cm_url_template_code A INNER JOIN cm_dev10 B ON A.code_id = B.url_template_cd WHERE B.mng_no = #{mngNo}

SELECT code_id, code_value1, CASE code_value2 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value2 END AS code_value2, CASE code_value3 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value3 END AS code_value3, CASE code_value4 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value4 END AS code_value4, CASE code_value5 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value5 END AS code_value5, CASE code_value6 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value6 END AS code_value6, CASE code_value7 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value7 END AS code_value7, CASE code_value8 WHEN '장비IP' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '호스트네임' THEN (SELECT dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) WHEN '사용자장비명' THEN (SELECT user_dev_name FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = #{mngNo}) ELSE code_value8 END AS code_value8, memo FROM cm_url_template_code A WHERE A.code_id = #{codeId}
